name: Snicker Bar Pie
recipeIngredient: 5 Snicker Bars (Regular Grocery Store Size), cut/chopped
16 oz Container of Whipped Cream (the biggest one you have)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the cream cheese and confectioner's sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the whipped cream, peanut butter, and chopped Snicker bars to the cream cheese mixture. Combine well.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared graham cracker crusts.
4. Refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight before serving.
